# agent-skills-pack

> A curated pack of 7 practical skills for LLM agents, demonstrating the agent-skills v0.1 specification with real, useful commands. Each skill validates against the canonical JSON schema and pairs cleanly with [`agent-skills-cli`](https://github.com/MauricioPerera/agent-skills-cli).

## Skills

- [HTTP GET request](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/MauricioPerera/agent-skills-pack@v1.0.0/skills/http-get/SKILL.md): fetch the contents of a URL.
- [HTTP POST with JSON body](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/MauricioPerera/agent-skills-pack@v1.0.0/skills/http-post-json/SKILL.md): POST structured data to a JSON-accepting endpoint.
- [Create a GitHub issue](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/MauricioPerera/agent-skills-pack@v1.0.0/skills/github-issue-create/SKILL.md): file an issue via `gh` CLI with full credential isolation.
- [Search code with ripgrep](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/MauricioPerera/agent-skills-pack@v1.0.0/skills/ripgrep-search/SKILL.md): find patterns across a codebase.
- [Read a file](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/MauricioPerera/agent-skills-pack@v1.0.0/skills/read-file/SKILL.md): inspect file content with line cap.
- [Query JSON with jq](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/MauricioPerera/agent-skills-pack@v1.0.0/skills/json-query/SKILL.md): extract / transform JSON.
- [Base64 encode a string](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/MauricioPerera/agent-skills-pack@v1.0.0/skills/base64-encode/SKILL.md): convert string to base64.

## Skills index (machine-readable)

- [skills-index.json](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/MauricioPerera/agent-skills-pack@v1.0.0/skills-index.json)

## About

These skills follow the [agent-skills specification v0.1.1](https://github.com/MauricioPerera/agent-skills). Each demonstrates a different pattern from the spec: network allowlisting, credential isolation, args composition, applicability filtering, etc.

License: MIT.
